summary: Senior Java developer with 8 years experience in enterprise Spring Boot applications for insurance and logistics industries. Expert in Java ecosystem. No Python or JavaScript/TypeScript experience. Considering pivoting to a new stack.

positions.title: Senior Java Developer
positions.description: Architected claims processing system using Java Spring Boot microservices. Led team of 5 developers. Designed Oracle DB schemas for claims data. Integrated SOAP web services for legacy system communication. Deployed on IBM WebSphere application server.

positions.title: Java Developer
positions.description: Built route optimization APIs in Java. Managed Oracle databases. Wrote Hibernate ORM mappings for complex supply chain models.

education.degree_name: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Engineering

certifications: Oracle Certified Professional Java SE 11 Developer

projects.title: ClaimsFlow
projects.description: Enterprise claims processing workflow engine built in Java Spring Boot. Handles 50k claims/day.
